examples: He was in a job where he felt unappreciated and undervalued.
She felt unappreciated both by her colleagues and her seniors.
A good listener will want to understand the reason they feel unappreciated.
Upon close examination, the alternatives don't look so good, while the College itself has unappreciated virtues.
But in the shadow of Nelson Mandela, any mere mortal is bound to be unappreciated.
